summary.en: Consumer fintech and online brokerage for Indonesians to invest in stocks, ETFs, and mutual funds.
summary.zh: 面向印尼民眾的消費型金融科技與線上券商,可投資股票、ETF 與共同基金。

highlight.en: An Indonesian online brokerage built to broaden financial inclusion, ranking among the country's largest brokerages by transaction volume.
highlight.zh: 以擴大金融普惠為使命的印尼線上券商,以交易量計位居該國最大券商之列。

summary.en: Supply chain technology platform connecting African cargo owners with truck operators.
summary.zh: 連結非洲貨主與卡車營運商的供應鏈技術平台。

highlight.en: Uses data analytics and AI to optimize African last-mile logistics, moving raw materials and finished goods seamlessly across the continent.
highlight.zh: 運用數據分析與 AI 優化非洲最後一哩物流,讓原料與成品在全洲順暢流通。

summary.en: Software platform that brings the in-home healthcare process online.
summary.zh: 將居家醫療照護流程數位化的軟體平台。

highlight.en: Replaces the fax-and-vendor patchwork behind in-home recovery with modern software, serving patients increasingly cared for at home.
highlight.zh: 以現代軟體取代居家康復背後傳真與多供應商拼湊的流程,服務日益增加的居家照護病患。

summary.en: Payment operations tools that automate the full money-movement cycle for businesses.
summary.zh: 為企業自動化完整資金流動週期的支付營運工具。

highlight.en: Automates payment initiation, approvals, and reconciliation end to end, accessible via web app or API.
highlight.zh: 端到端自動化付款發起、審批與對帳,可透過網頁應用或 API 存取。

summary.en: A simple SDK and API for managing in-app subscriptions across mobile platforms.
summary.zh: 用於管理行動端 App 內訂閱的簡易 SDK 與 API。

highlight.en: Removes the complexity of supporting App Store and Google Play subscription systems so developers can focus on their business.
highlight.zh: 消除支援 App Store 與 Google Play 訂閱系統的複雜性,讓開發者專注於經營業務。

summary.en: Software modernizing the hospitality tech stack by digitizing paper-based hotel workflows.
summary.zh: 將飯店紙本作業數位化、現代化旅宿業技術堆疊的軟體。

highlight.en: Brings paper-based hospitality workflows online, with solutions trusted by hotel groups including Four Seasons, Wyndham, and Ace Hotel.
highlight.zh: 將紙本旅宿作業搬上線,獲四季、溫德姆與 Ace Hotel 等飯店集團採用。

summary.en: A Company Brain that maps how work gets done and reallocates it between people and AI agents.
summary.zh: 繪製工作實際運作方式、並在員工與 AI 代理間重新分配任務的「企業大腦」。

highlight.en: Maps and anonymizes real work via screen sharing, then builds agents and redesigns processes around business objectives; used by OpenAI and DoorDash.
highlight.zh: 透過螢幕共享繪製並匿名化實際工作,再依業務目標打造代理並重新設計流程;OpenAI、DoorDash 等採用。

summary.en: An all-in-one modern business phone system for teams with calling, messaging, and a lightweight CRM.
summary.zh: 為團隊打造的全方位現代商務電話系統,具備通話、簡訊與輕量 CRM。

highlight.en: Lets teammates share a business phone number like an inbox, working across Mac, Windows, Web, iOS, and Android.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊成員像共享收件匣般共用商務電話號碼,並支援 Mac、Windows、網頁、iOS 與 Android。

summary.en: A nonprofit working internationally to accelerate alternative protein innovation.
summary.zh: 在國際間致力加速替代蛋白創新的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Advances plant-based, cultivated, and fermentation-made meat to cut food-system emissions, lower zoonotic risk, and feed more people with fewer resources.
highlight.zh: 推動植物基、細胞培養與發酵製肉,以降低食品系統排放與人畜共通疾病風險,並用更少資源餵養更多人。

summary.en: A platform enabling creators to build games, experiences, and virtual worlds.
summary.zh: 讓創作者打造遊戲、體驗與虛擬世界的平台。

highlight.en: Creators of Highrise, a virtual world with 50 million users, building technology for developers and amateurs to craft immersive experiences.
highlight.zh: 虛擬世界 Highrise 的開發者,擁有 5,000 萬用戶,為開發者與業餘玩家提供打造沉浸式體驗的技術。

summary.en: A regulated wealth manager letting people in Latin America invest.
summary.zh: 讓拉丁美洲民眾投資、受監管的財富管理服務。

highlight.en: Manages over USD 2B for more than 200,000 customers, regulated in Mexico and Chile.
highlight.zh: 為超過 20 萬名客戶管理逾 20 億美元資產,於墨西哥與智利受監管。

summary.en: A real estate developer building walkable communities designed for people, not cars.
summary.zh: 打造以人為本、而非以車為本之可步行社區的房地產開發商。

highlight.en: Designs, builds, and manages neighborhoods that prioritize biking, walking, and transit, partnering with mobility companies for car-free urban living.
highlight.zh: 設計、建造並管理優先考量自行車、步行與大眾運輸的社區,並與交通服務商合作打造無車城市生活。

summary.en: A mobile platform giving students instant answers to test-prep questions.
summary.zh: 為學生提供升學備考問題即時解答的行動平台。

highlight.en: Makes test prep faster and cheaper via 35,000 tutors delivering instant answers, serving students in Turkey and India.
highlight.zh: 透過 35,000 名導師提供即時解答,讓備考更快更省錢,服務土耳其與印度的學生。

summary.en: A primary care practice that serves residents of senior living communities.
summary.zh: 服務銀髮社區住戶的基層醫療診所。

highlight.en: Brings clinicians on-site into senior living communities under a value-based model, keeping residents healthy and away from hospital health risks.
highlight.zh: 以價值導向模式將臨床人員帶入銀髮社區現場,讓住戶保持健康並遠離醫院的健康風險。

summary.en: An all-in-one platform for selling and managing experience businesses directly online.
summary.zh: 用於直接線上銷售與經營體驗事業的全方位平台。

highlight.en: Calls its approach Experience Commerce, combining booking, payment, and marketing tools so creators can sell experiences on their own website.
highlight.zh: 將其方法稱為「體驗電商」,整合預訂、支付與行銷工具,讓創作者在自有網站銷售體驗。

summary.en: A simple, secure bookkeeping app for small businesses in India.
summary.zh: 為印度小型企業打造的簡易安全記帳 App。

highlight.en: Digitizes informal credit tracking for India's small merchants, letting them record transactions, send reminders, and collect payments faster.
highlight.zh: 為印度小商家數位化非正式賒帳追蹤,讓他們記錄交易、發送提醒並更快收款。

summary.en: A leading US digital bank offering personal and business banking.
summary.zh: 提供個人與企業金融服務的美國領先數位銀行。

highlight.en: A digital banking platform serving both personal and business customers in the US.
highlight.zh: 一個同時服務美國個人與企業客戶的數位銀行平台。

summary.en: AI agents and software for loan servicing and collections.
summary.zh: 用於貸款服務與催收的 AI 代理與軟體。

highlight.en: Builds AI agents that automate critical consumer-finance roles to improve margins, run leaner operations, and maximize payments.
highlight.zh: 打造自動化消費金融關鍵職能的 AI 代理,以提升利潤、精簡營運並最大化回收款。

summary.en: An AI and IoT platform for managing and optimizing physical field operations.
summary.zh: 用於管理與優化實體現場作業的 AI 與 IoT 平台。

highlight.en: Connects and analyzes real-time data from fleets, equipment, and worksites to improve safety and productivity while cutting fuel, emissions, and downtime.
highlight.zh: 連結並分析車隊、設備與工地的即時數據,以提升安全與生產力,同時減少油耗、排放與停機時間。

summary.en: Verifies global supply chains for issues like child slavery and deforestation.
summary.zh: 針對童工奴役等問題查核全球供應鏈。

highlight.en: Audits global supply chains to surface serious issues such as child slavery, helping make sourcing more transparent.
highlight.zh: 稽查全球供應鏈以揭露童工奴役等嚴重問題,協助提升採購透明度。

summary.en: Managed corporate housing and co-living for young white-collar professionals in India.
summary.zh: 為印度年輕白領專業人士提供的代管企業住宿與共居服務。

highlight.en: Builds India's co-living communities for young professionals, pairing managed living spaces with services to spare them the woes of house hunting.
highlight.zh: 為印度年輕專業人士打造共居社區,結合代管居住空間與服務,讓他們免於找房之苦。

summary.en: An online provider of mental health care with remote clinicians and a smartphone program.
summary.zh: 提供遠距臨床人員與智慧型手機療程的線上心理健康服務。

highlight.en: Combines licensed therapists, a smartphone treatment program, a biofeedback wearable, and peer support, with outcomes published in peer-reviewed journals.
highlight.zh: 結合執照治療師、智慧型手機療程、生物回饋穿戴裝置與同儕支持,療效已發表於同行評審期刊。

summary.en: A complete toolkit that lets any business sell flights, accommodation, and travel extras.
summary.zh: 讓任何企業銷售機票、住宿與旅遊附加服務的完整工具組。

highlight.en: Lets businesses from travel startups to financial enterprises shop flights and accommodation, buy extras, and manage bookings through one platform.
highlight.zh: 讓從旅遊新創到金融企業的各類業者透過單一平台搜尋機票與住宿、購買附加服務並管理訂單。

summary.en: Building an AI- and cloud-native diagnostic OS for medical imaging.
summary.zh: 打造以 AI 與雲端為本的醫療影像診斷作業系統。

highlight.en: Its diagnostic OS aims to deliver accurate, timely medical imaging, serving over 2,600 medical institutions across 18 countries.
highlight.zh: 其診斷作業系統旨在提供準確且及時的醫療影像,服務 18 國逾 2,600 家醫療機構。

summary.en: Online primary care for services like refilling birth control, finished in about five minutes.
summary.zh: 提供如續開避孕藥等服務、約五分鐘即可完成的線上基層醫療。

highlight.en: Delivers app-based medical care without insurance, video, or phone calls, with most visits under $20 across more than a dozen US states.
highlight.zh: 以 App 提供無需保險、視訊或電話的醫療服務,多數看診費用低於 20 美元,涵蓋十多個美國州。

summary.en: Intelligent lab operations solutions powered by AI and IoT (AIoT).
summary.zh: 以 AI 與 IoT(AIoT)驅動的智慧實驗室營運解決方案。

highlight.en: Combines AIoT with software into an end-to-end automation platform that boosts efficiency, compliance, and safety across global R&D labs.
highlight.zh: 結合 AIoT 與軟體,打造端到端自動化平台,提升全球研發實驗室的效率、合規與安全。

summary.en: Licenses restaurant brands for delivery and pick-up via virtual kitchens.
summary.zh: 透過虛擬廚房為外送與外帶授權餐廳品牌。

highlight.en: Operates delivery-native, multi-restaurant virtual kitchens that handle cooking and fulfillment so restaurant partners can expand their delivery reach.
highlight.zh: 營運以外送為本的多餐廳虛擬廚房,負責烹調與履約,讓餐廳夥伴擴大外送觸及範圍。

summary.en: A wealth manager aiming to put a human wealth advisor in everyone's pocket.
summary.zh: 志在讓人人口袋裡都有真人財富顧問的財富管理服務。

highlight.en: Uses AI to give advisors leverage, opening up wealth management once reserved for the ultra-wealthy; manages over $1 billion in client assets.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 賦能顧問,將過去專屬超高淨值人士的財富管理普及化;管理逾 10 億美元客戶資產。

summary.en: Predicts how much perishable food grocery stores should order to cut waste.
summary.zh: 預測雜貨店應訂購多少生鮮食品以減少浪費。

highlight.en: Accurately forecasts the perfect order quantity of perishable goods, helping grocers increase sales while reducing food waste.
highlight.zh: 精準預測生鮮商品的最佳訂購量,協助雜貨商提升銷售並減少食物浪費。

summary.en: Digitizing wealth management to democratize financial services in Africa.
summary.zh: 數位化財富管理以普及非洲金融服務。

highlight.en: Uses technology and investment management to deliver affordable savings and investment products to Africa's mass market.
highlight.zh: 運用技術與投資管理,為非洲大眾市場提供平價的儲蓄與投資產品。

summary.en: Instant, accurate ID verification to help platforms convert more verified users.
summary.zh: 即時、準確的身分驗證,協助平台轉換更多通過驗證的用戶。

highlight.en: Founded by Airbnb's former Trust & Safety leaders, it offers ID verification and fraud detection via developer-friendly SDKs.
highlight.zh: 由 Airbnb 前信任與安全主管創立,透過對開發者友善的 SDK 提供身分驗證與詐騙偵測。

summary.en: Next-generation, more sustainable ingredients to decarbonize consumer products.
summary.zh: 用於為消費品脫碳、更永續的次世代原料。

highlight.en: Its biomanufacturing platform makes better-performing alternatives to oils and fats, starting with Palmless, an alternative to palm oil.
highlight.zh: 其生物製造平台生產性能更佳的油脂替代品,首款產品 Palmless 是棕櫚油的替代方案。

summary.en: AI-powered document fraud detection for banks, credit unions, and lenders.
summary.zh: 為銀行、信用合作社與放款機構提供的 AI 文件詐騙偵測。

highlight.en: Created the document fraud detection category, spotting forged, AI-generated, and deepfake financial documents in seconds without slowing approvals.
highlight.zh: 開創文件詐騙偵測類別,可在數秒內辨識偽造、AI 生成與深偽的金融文件,且不拖慢審批。

summary.en: An automated solution for managing complex freight transactions.
summary.zh: 用於管理複雜貨運交易的自動化解決方案。

highlight.en: Automates financial and operational audits for global shippers so logistics businesses can focus on moving cargo.
highlight.zh: 為全球託運人自動化財務與營運稽核,讓物流業者專注於運送貨物。

summary.en: Autonomous drones that scan warehouse inventory.
summary.zh: 用於盤點倉庫庫存的自主無人機。

highlight.en: Software lets drones fly indoors and collect analytics, automating inventory tracking inside warehouses.
highlight.zh: 軟體讓無人機可於室內飛行並蒐集分析資料,自動化倉庫內的庫存追蹤。

summary.en: Cryptocurrency infrastructure for Africa, formerly known as Buycoins.
summary.zh: 為非洲打造的加密貨幣基礎設施,前身為 Buycoins。

highlight.en: Runs Sendcash for diaspora remittances and Buycoins for buying, selling, and managing crypto portfolios across Africa.
highlight.zh: 營運供僑民匯款的 Sendcash,以及在非洲買賣與管理加密資產組合的 Buycoins。

summary.en: A modern, AI-powered clinical trial software platform.
summary.zh: 現代化、由 AI 驅動的臨床試驗軟體平台。

highlight.en: An eClinical platform with AI-powered ePRO, eConsent, and integrated EDC that helps sponsors, CROs, and sites launch studies faster.
highlight.zh: 具備 AI 驅動 ePRO、eConsent 與整合 EDC 的 eClinical 平台,協助贊助方、CRO 與試驗點更快啟動研究。

summary.en: Mytos builds robots that manufacture human cells from stem cells.
summary.zh: Mytos 打造由幹細胞製造人類細胞的機器人。

highlight.en: Fully automates production of stem-cell-derived cells like neurons and heart cells, aiming for the 1000x capacity needed to scale regenerative medicine.
highlight.zh: 全面自動化生產神經元與心肌細胞等幹細胞衍生細胞,目標達成擴大再生醫療所需的千倍產能。

summary.en: A platform enabling the scaled manufacturing of next-generation medicines.
summary.zh: 使次世代醫療得以規模化製造的平台。

highlight.en: Its VectorSelect platform combines massively parallel screens with computation to engineer high-yield cell lines for advanced therapies.
highlight.zh: 其 VectorSelect 平台結合大規模平行篩選與運算,為先進療法工程化高產量細胞株。

summary.en: A low-code funnel builder built for health and wellness brands.
summary.zh: 為健康與保健品牌打造的低程式碼漏斗建構工具。

highlight.en: Replaces form builders and custom code, letting teams build and embed custom onboarding flows with analytics, no engineering required.
highlight.zh: 取代表單建構工具與客製程式碼,讓團隊免工程資源即可打造並嵌入帶分析的客製化導入流程。

summary.en: A code-free platform that lets anyone create, publish, and monetize video games.
summary.zh: 讓任何人皆可建立、發布與變現電子遊戲的免程式碼平台。

highlight.en: Bundles a code-free game creation engine with high-quality art assets; backed by Tencent, March Capital, and Makers Fund.
highlight.zh: 將免程式碼遊戲創作引擎與高品質美術素材結合;獲騰訊、March Capital 與 Makers Fund 投資。

summary.en: Turns designs and websites into clean code, with on-brand vibe-coding.
summary.zh: 將設計與網站轉換為乾淨程式碼,並支援符合品牌調性的 vibe-coding。

highlight.en: With over 1.5 million installs, it converts Figma designs or live websites into clean React, HTML, or Vue code for design and dev teams.
highlight.zh: 安裝量逾 150 萬,可將 Figma 設計或現有網站轉為乾淨的 React、HTML 或 Vue 程式碼,供設計與開發團隊使用。

summary.en: Technology that builds fast, visual indexes of people and organizations.
summary.zh: 快速建立人員與組織視覺索引的技術。

highlight.en: Creates a customizable visual directory of everyone in an organization, helping staff learn who's who and get in touch when needed.
highlight.zh: 建立可客製化的組織全員視覺名錄,協助員工認識同事並在需要時取得聯繫。

summary.en: A skills-based talent management platform for a dynamic workforce.
summary.zh: 為動態人力打造、以技能為本的人才管理平台。

highlight.en: Maps employee skills from a 20,000-skill library with AI suggestions, guiding upskilling and matching talent to gigs, projects, and roles.
highlight.zh: 以 2 萬項技能庫與 AI 建議繪製員工能力,引導技能提升並媒合人才至臨時任務、專案與職位。

summary.en: An AI agent for creating customer-facing content like campaigns and ROI reports in minutes.
summary.zh: 幾分鐘內生成 ABM 行銷活動與 ROI 報告等面向客戶內容的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Lets go-to-market teams build ABM campaigns, business cases, and ROI reports without waiting on other teams; used by Figma, Rippling, and Uber.
highlight.zh: 讓行銷團隊無需等待其他團隊即可製作 ABM 活動、商業提案與 ROI 報告;Figma、Rippling、Uber 等採用。

summary.en: AI-generated personalized daily nutrition and supplement packs.
summary.zh: 由 AI 生成的個人化每日營養與保健品包。

highlight.en: Uses generative AI to analyze diet, goals, and biometrics, then produces and ships custom daily supplement day packs by monthly subscription.
highlight.zh: 運用生成式 AI 分析飲食、目標與生理數據,以月訂閱方式生產並寄送客製化每日保健品日包。

summary.en: Software for automatic circuit board design.
summary.zh: 用於自動化電路板設計的軟體。

highlight.en: Automates the design of printed circuit boards through code.
highlight.zh: 透過程式碼自動化印刷電路板的設計。

summary.en: Fermentation-derived natural products that address health problems.
summary.zh: 以發酵製得、用於解決健康問題的天然產物。

highlight.en: Engineers microbes to produce high-value ingredients for medicines, supplements, and wellness products through sustainable biomanufacturing.
highlight.zh: 以永續生物製造工程化微生物,生產用於藥品、保健品與保健產品的高價值成分。

summary.en: An AI-powered automated receptionist that answers missed calls for local businesses.
summary.zh: 為在地企業接聽未接來電的 AI 自動接待員。

highlight.en: Founded after Hurricane Maria, its AI answers missed calls 24/7 to schedule appointments and handle admin questions for local businesses.
highlight.zh: 創立於瑪莉亞颶風之後,其 AI 全天候接聽未接來電,為在地企業安排預約並處理行政問題。

summary.en: Powers bookings and payments for the $648 billion care economy.
summary.zh: 為 6,480 億美元的照護經濟提供預訂與支付服務。

highlight.en: Starts with child care, a $136B largely undigitized and cash-driven category, bringing bookings and payments online.
highlight.zh: 從 1,360 億美元、多以現金運作且尚未數位化的托育市場切入,將預訂與支付搬上線。

summary.en: A database for AI that creates, stores, versions, and streams multi-modal datasets.
summary.zh: 用於建立、儲存、版本控管與串流多模態資料集的 AI 資料庫。

highlight.en: Its Deep Lake stores embeddings alongside original data with automatic version control, powering foundation model training without re-computation.
highlight.zh: 其 Deep Lake 將嵌入向量與原始資料一同儲存並自動版本控管,免重算即可支援基礎模型訓練。

summary.en: A cloud-based platform helping hospitals manage, buy, and sell medical inventory.
summary.zh: 協助醫院管理、買賣醫療庫存的雲端平台。

highlight.en: A cloud-based asset management and remarketing platform that helps hospitals handle and resell their equipment inventory.
highlight.zh: 雲端資產管理與再行銷平台,協助醫院管理並轉售其設備庫存。

summary.en: Political and civic tech helping progressive campaigns and causes organize and mobilize.
summary.zh: 協助進步派競選與倡議組織動員的政治與公民科技。

highlight.en: Grew from a get-out-the-vote tool into a full distributed-organizing platform; volunteers have sent over 100 million text messages via the product.
highlight.zh: 從催票工具發展為完整的分散式組織平台;志工已透過該產品發送逾 1 億則簡訊。

summary.en: The Supplant Company makes a new blend of sugars from plant fiber.
summary.zh: The Supplant Company 以植物纖維製造全新的糖類混合物。

highlight.en: Upcycles agricultural side-streams like corn cobs and straw into fiber-based sugars that are lower in calories and prebiotic.
highlight.zh: 將玉米芯與秸稈等農業副產物升級再造為纖維製糖,熱量較低且具益生元功效。

summary.en: An AI clinical assistant that answers doctors' clinical questions.
summary.zh: 為醫師解答臨床問題的 AI 臨床助理。

highlight.en: Can be trained on any hospital content to give doctors instant answers to clinical questions, with a mission to empower doctors worldwide.
highlight.zh: 可在任何醫院內容上訓練,為醫師即時解答臨床問題,使命是賦能全球醫師。

summary.en: Machine intelligence that predicts emerging trends for beauty and food marketers.
summary.zh: 為美妝與食品行銷人員預測新興趨勢的機器智能。

highlight.en: Uses machine intelligence to spot the next big beauty and food trends, having flagged turmeric, face masks, and cold brew early.
highlight.zh: 運用機器智能發掘下一波美妝與食品趨勢,曾提早捕捉薑黃、面膜與冷萃咖啡。

summary.en: Virtual Lab Managers providing purchasing and operations support to research labs.
summary.zh: 為研究實驗室提供採購與營運支援的虛擬實驗室經理。

highlight.en: Pairs PhD-level former scientists with software tools to handle lab purchasing, inventory, and bookkeeping as an outsourced lab management service.
highlight.zh: 以博士級前科學家搭配軟體工具,作為外包實驗室管理服務處理採購、庫存與記帳。

summary.en: A tech-enabled commercial mortgage broker for property financing.
summary.zh: 以技術賦能的商業房貸經紀,用於不動產融資。

highlight.en: Uses technology to streamline commercial mortgage brokerage, helping property owners arrange financing.
highlight.zh: 運用技術簡化商業房貸經紀流程,協助業主安排融資。

summary.en: Robots for robotic harvesting and analytics in greenhouses.
summary.zh: 用於溫室機器人採收與分析的機器人。

highlight.en: Developing a tomato-harvesting robot that also performs quality checks and packaging, aiming to cut greenhouse production costs through automation.
highlight.zh: 開發兼具品質檢測與包裝的番茄採收機器人,藉自動化降低溫室生產成本。

summary.en: A nonprofit connecting survivors of trafficking and violence to careers in tech.
summary.zh: 連結人口販運與暴力倖存者進入科技職涯的非營利組織。

highlight.en: Trains survivors of human trafficking and gender-based violence to become programmers, building economic and technological empowerment.
highlight.zh: 訓練人口販運與性別暴力倖存者成為程式設計師,建立經濟與技術上的自主力量。

summary.en: Smartphone-enabled, at-home diagnostic testing.
summary.zh: 以智慧型手機為輔助的居家診斷檢測。

highlight.en: Its first product is the only FDA-cleared over-the-counter app providing at-home testing and treatment for urinary tract infections.
highlight.zh: 其首款產品是唯一獲 FDA 核准的非處方 App,提供尿道感染的居家檢測與治療。

summary.en: AI-powered augmented reality navigation that runs on a smartphone.
summary.zh: 可在智慧型手機上運行、AI 驅動的擴增實境導航。

highlight.en: Builds AR navigation with ultra-lightweight road-understanding AI running entirely at-the-edge on smartphone-level compute to enhance driving safety.
highlight.zh: 以超輕量道路理解 AI 打造 AR 導航,完全在智慧型手機級算力的邊緣端運行,以提升行車安全。

summary.en: A food manufacturing technology company driving plant-based meat toward price parity.
summary.zh: 推動植物肉達到價格平價的食品製造技術公司。

highlight.en: Uses novel high-throughput manufacturing equipment and smart production to make low-cost plant-based meat at high volumes.
highlight.zh: 運用新型高產能製造設備與智慧生產,以大量生產低成本植物肉。

summary.en: Deploys autonomous drones to 911 calls to give first responders situational awareness.
summary.zh: 派遣自主無人機前往 911 報案現場,為第一線人員提供現場態勢資訊。

highlight.en: When a 911 call arrives, its drone autonomously launches from a fire station and streams live video, revealing details like a fire's size and location.
highlight.zh: 當 911 報案進來時,其無人機自消防站自主起飛並回傳即時影像,呈現火勢規模與確切位置等細節。

summary.en: Brain-inspired AI processors built as physical neural networks.
summary.zh: 以實體神經網路打造、受大腦啟發的 AI 處理器。

highlight.en: Its Memristive Nanowire Neural Network packs over ten million spiking neurons per square centimeter, using far less power than GPUs and CPUs.
highlight.zh: 其憶阻奈米線神經網路每平方公分容納逾千萬個脈衝神經元,功耗遠低於 GPU 與 CPU。

summary.en: An investor management platform for private funds.
summary.zh: 為私募基金打造的投資人管理平台。

highlight.en: Centralizes digital subscriptions, the data room, and ongoing investor communication for private funds in a single platform.
highlight.zh: 在單一平台集中管理私募基金的數位認購、資料室與持續性投資人溝通。

summary.en: Manage capital, investors, and banking in one turn-key portal.
summary.zh: 在單一即用型入口管理資金、投資人與銀行業務。

highlight.en: A turn-key portal to issue Funds, SAFEs, and Notes while managing investors, treasury, multi-currency accounts, and global ACH/Wire payments.
highlight.zh: 即用型入口,可發行基金、SAFE 與本票,同時管理投資人、資金、多幣別帳戶與全球 ACH/電匯付款。

summary.en: A tool to capture, create, and share gaming moments, acquired by Niantic.
summary.zh: 用於擷取、創作與分享遊戲精彩時刻的工具,已被 Niantic 收購。

highlight.en: Built tools for capturing and sharing gaming moments before being acquired by Niantic in 2021.
highlight.zh: 打造擷取與分享遊戲時刻的工具,2021 年被 Niantic 收購。

summary.en: Cashierless checkout that brings physical stores into the digital age.
summary.zh: 讓實體商店邁入數位時代的無收銀結帳。

highlight.en: Provides cashierless checkout technology to modernize physical retail stores.
highlight.zh: 提供無收銀結帳技術,讓實體零售店現代化。

summary.en: Cancer diagnosis claimed to be 10x faster and 10x cheaper.
summary.zh: 標榜速度快十倍、成本省十倍的癌症診斷。

highlight.en: Aims to make cancer diagnosis dramatically faster and more affordable.
highlight.zh: 目標讓癌症診斷大幅加快並更為平價。

summary.en: Tools and services to protect employees against online harassment.
summary.zh: 保護員工免受網路騷擾的工具與服務。

highlight.en: Works proactively to prevent harassment from escalating and provides expert incident response when people come under attack.
highlight.zh: 主動防止騷擾升級,並在人們遭受攻擊時提供專業事件應變服務。

summary.en: An online convenience store for residential and office buildings.
summary.zh: 為住宅與辦公大樓設立的線上便利商店。

highlight.en: Embeds a virtual marketplace into buildings as an amenity, using building operators to acquire tenants and avoid costly customer acquisition and last-mile fees.
highlight.zh: 將虛擬商城嵌入大樓作為附加設施,借助大樓營運方獲取租戶,以省去高昂的獲客與最後一哩費用。

summary.en: A research and analytics company focused on college students.
summary.zh: 專注於大學生族群的研究與分析公司。

highlight.en: Runs the largest college-student opinion panel, with over 700K panelists from 1,500 universities across all 50 states.
highlight.zh: 營運最大規模的大學生意見樣本庫,涵蓋全美 50 州 1,500 所大學的逾 70 萬名樣本。

summary.en: A fast, beautifully designed calendar built for remote teams.
summary.zh: 為遠端團隊打造、快速且設計精美的行事曆。

highlight.en: Positions itself as the world's fastest calendar, designed for the scheduling needs of remote teams.
highlight.zh: 以世界最快行事曆自居,專為遠端團隊的排程需求而設計。

summary.en: A fintech company.
summary.zh: 一家金融科技公司。

highlight.en: A Summer 2018 YC fintech startup based in the US.
highlight.zh: 一家總部位於美國、2018 年夏季 YC 梯次的金融科技新創。

summary.en: Developer-friendly, enterprise-grade APIs for global financial market data.
summary.zh: 面向開發者、企業級的全球金融市場數據 API。

highlight.en: A one-stop shop for stocks, ETFs, forex, crypto, economic metrics, and technical indicators delivered through REST APIs and spreadsheets.
highlight.zh: 透過 REST API 與試算表提供股票、ETF、外匯、加密貨幣、經濟指標與技術指標的一站式市場數據。

summary.en: New therapeutics to rejuvenate tissue and treat age-related diseases.
summary.zh: 用於使組織再生並治療老化相關疾病的新型療法。

highlight.en: Developing therapeutics aimed at rejuvenating tissue to address diseases associated with aging.
highlight.zh: 開發旨在使組織再生的療法,以對抗與老化相關的疾病。

summary.en: Turns screen recordings into desktop automations using program synthesis.
summary.zh: 以程式合成將螢幕錄影轉為桌面自動化的工具。

highlight.en: Compiles a screen recording, synthesizes a program from the analysis, and produces an automation or on-screen guide within seconds.
highlight.zh: 編譯螢幕錄影、由分析合成程式,並在數秒內產生自動化流程或螢幕操作指引。

summary.en: Operating systems for biology labs.
summary.zh: 為生物實驗室打造的作業系統。

highlight.en: Builds operating-system software to run and coordinate biology lab operations.
highlight.zh: 打造作業系統軟體,以運行並協調生物實驗室的作業。

summary.en: A conversation design platform for building tailored, multilingual AI assistants.
summary.zh: 用於打造客製化多語 AI 助理的對話設計平台。

highlight.en: Lets companies build multilingual AI assistants powered by generative models like GPT and add them to any website, product, app, game, or device.
highlight.zh: 讓企業以 GPT 等生成式模型打造多語 AI 助理,並加入任何網站、產品、App、遊戲或裝置。

summary.en: A group-therapy platform for providers and health systems.
summary.zh: 為醫療提供者與醫療系統打造的團體治療平台。

highlight.en: Uses AI and analytics to streamline provider admin, automate participant check-ins, and flag group members who may be at risk.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 與分析簡化提供者行政、自動化參與者報到,並標記可能處於風險中的團體成員。

summary.en: Crowdsources food safety reports to detect and prevent outbreaks.
summary.zh: 群眾外包食品安全通報以偵測並預防疫情爆發。

highlight.en: Provides real-time surveillance tools and data used by industry, public health, and consumers globally to declutter outbreak detection.
highlight.zh: 提供即時監測工具與數據,供全球業界、公衛單位與消費者用於簡化疫情爆發偵測。

summary.en: Universal CRM integration for B2B SaaS apps with a single build.
summary.zh: 讓 B2B SaaS 應用一次建置即可整合各家 CRM 的通用整合方案。

highlight.en: Gives B2B SaaS developers one standard API to integrate every customer's CRM, including custom fields, objects, and workflows.
highlight.zh: 為 B2B SaaS 開發者提供單一標準 API,整合每位客戶的 CRM,涵蓋自訂欄位、物件與工作流程。

summary.en: A national online vegan specialty store, described as Amazon for vegans.
summary.zh: 全國性線上純素專賣店,被形容為純素版亞馬遜。

highlight.en: Starting with food and expanding to beauty and home goods, it uses data to predict and launch products it expects to succeed exclusively.
highlight.zh: 從食品起步並擴展至美妝與家居用品,運用數據預測並獨家推出其看好的產品。

summary.en: Sensors and software that increase hospital efficiency.
summary.zh: 提升醫院效率的感測器與軟體。

highlight.en: Deploys location beacons to track patient and doctor movement, measure workflow inefficiencies, and give hospitals targeted improvement recommendations.
highlight.zh: 部署定位信標追蹤病患與醫師動線,衡量工作流程低效之處,並向醫院提供針對性改善建議。

summary.en: GitHub for visual data, with labeling tools and a dataset marketplace.
summary.zh: 視覺資料版的 GitHub,具備標註工具與資料集市集。

highlight.en: Aims to accelerate AI development at scale through top-notch image labeling tools and a dataset marketplace.
highlight.zh: 透過頂尖影像標註工具與資料集市集,旨在加速大規模 AI 開發。

summary.en: A standardized proficiency exam (CSPA) for software engineers.
summary.zh: 為軟體工程師設計的標準化能力評量(CSPA)。

highlight.en: Tests engineers' knowledge across many topics and shares results with employers and schools via a SaaS candidate database.
highlight.zh: 評量工程師跨領域的知識,並透過 SaaS 候選人資料庫將結果分享給雇主與學校。

summary.en: Uses monogenic disorders to inform and solve highly complex health problems.
summary.zh: 運用單基因疾病以理解並解決高度複雜的健康問題。

highlight.en: A pharmaceutical company leveraging insights from monogenic disorders to tackle highly complex diseases.
highlight.zh: 一家利用單基因疾病洞見來攻克高度複雜疾病的製藥公司。

summary.en: Developing novel therapeutics for aging and chronic disease.
summary.zh: 開發針對老化與慢性疾病的新型療法。

highlight.en: Works on new therapeutics targeting the biology of aging and chronic disease.
highlight.zh: 致力開發針對老化生物學與慢性疾病的新型療法。

summary.en: Smart hardware for injury recovery.
summary.zh: 用於傷害復原的智慧硬體。

highlight.en: Works with top athletic teams and doctors, offering up-to-date athlete data and customized treatments to reduce injuries and speed healing.
highlight.zh: 與頂尖運動隊伍及醫師合作,提供即時運動員數據與客製化療程,以降低傷害並加速癒合。
